sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n9893" key="a)ntidie/ceimi" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀντιδιέξειμι</orth>, (<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">εἶμι</foreign> <sense id="n9893.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">ibo</tr_>) <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">go through, recountinturn,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">ὀνόματα</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0026.tlg001.perseus-grc1:155" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aeschin.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.155</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
